question: How did you implement strict TypeScript configuration across IQTech client projects?
answer: We implemented strict TypeScript configuration across IQTech client projects by extending patterns already proven in @iqtech/ui-core. The implementation leaned on TypeScript, React with TypeScript types shared across repos. Feature teams copied the reference implementation instead of inventing local variants. Shared @iqtech/ui-core components meant strict TypeScript configuration looked different per client theme but behaved the same under RBAC checks. That consistency helped us resolve most production UI defects within one business day.
